ground_truth.title: Marietta Electricians Costs & Prices - ProMatcher Cost Report
ground_truth.main_content:
Marietta Electricians Costs & Prices

Marietta, Georgia.  The Marietta Electricians Cost Report is a concise report on everything you need to know about the cost of electricians in the Marietta area.

Average Electricians Cost in Marietta
We have done a little research to find the average cost of electricians in Marietta. Here are the average costs and prices reported back to us:

Cost of Electrical for Remodel or Addition in Marietta, Georgia
$80.45 per hour (plus materials and parts) (Range: $76.16 - $84.73)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Cost of Electrical Fixture Installation in Marietta, Georgia
$132.33 fixed fee to install 120v outlet (Range: $123.76 - $140.90)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Cost of Upgrade Electrical Panel or Wiring in Marietta, Georgia
$2,008.72 fixed fee (upgrade panel to 200 amps) (Range: $1,732.64 - $2,284.80)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Cost of Residential Electrical Contractors in Marietta, Georgia
$68.55 per hour (plus parts and materials) (Range: $61.88 - $75.21)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Cost of Commercial Electrical Contractors in Marietta, Georgia
$84.73 per hour (plus parts and materials) (Range: $80.92 - $88.54)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Cost of EV Home Charging Station Installation in Marietta, Georgia
$199.54 for level 1 charger (120 volts) (Range: $152.03 - $247.05)
$1,102.71 for level 2 charger (240 volts) (Range: $1,055.67 - $1,149.74)
Free Estimates from Local Pros

Marietta Electricians Cost Data
Professionals in the Marietta area have provided information about how much electricians cost(s). Here are some of the individual reports:

30060, Marietta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$151.68 - $246.48 for level 1 charger (120 volts)
This EV charging station installation cost estimate considers the cost of labor. Price takes into account electric car charger, necessary wiring, and permitting fees. Excludes available tax rebates, electrical service upgrades, and commercial-grade charging stations.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$1,053.23 - $1,147.08 for level 2 charger (240 volts)
This EV charging station installation cost estimate considers the cost of labor. Price takes into account electric car charger, necessary wiring, and permitting fees. Excludes available tax rebates, electrical service upgrades, and commercial-grade charging stations.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - February 15, 2022
Residential Electrical Contractors
$61.62 - $74.89 per hour (plus parts and materials)
Estimate for residential electrical work is included. No additional charge for basic home electrical work (installation, repair, and maintenance). Cost does not take into account parts, emergency calls, weekend hours, and commercial electrical work.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - May 12, 2021
Upgrade Electrical Panel or Wiring
$1,725.36 - $2,275.20 fixed fee (upgrade panel to 200 amps)
Estimate takes into account labor. It also includes 200-amp electrical panel (mid-grade), supplies, and cleanup. Cost estimate excludes emergency calls, overtime (nights and weekends), and extensive rewiring.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - March 5, 2021
Electrical Fixture Installation
$123.24 - $140.30 fixed fee to install 120v outlet
Includes pricing for electrical outlet installation. Cost takes into account 120V interior outlet, materials, and cleanup. Excludes emergency work, major rewiring, outdoor installations, GFCI outlets, and 220-240 volt outlets.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - September 26, 2020
Electrical for Remodel or Addition
$75.84 - $84.37 per hour (plus materials and parts)
Cost takes into account the price of home addition electrical work. No additional charge for installation of new wiring, outlets, and switches during construction. Price does not account for materials, permits, and overtime work.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30060, Marietta, Georgia - June 7, 2018
Commercial Electrical Contractors
$80.58 - $88.16 per hour (plus parts and materials)
Includes pricing for commercial electrical work. Cost takes into account basic electrical work (installation, repair, and maintenance). Excludes parts, materials, minimum fees, emergency repairs.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30022, Alpharetta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$1,071.00 - $1,166.44 for level 2 charger (240 volts)
Price quote includes electric vehicle charging station installation. It includes standard charging station, connecting unit, and securing charger to wall too. Excludes upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30096, Duluth, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$149.12 - $242.32 for level 1 charger (120 volts)
Price range takes into account electric vehicle charging station installation labor. Accounts for the price of standard charging station, connecting unit, and securing charger to wall. Excludes upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30043, Lawrenceville, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$1,056.56 - $1,150.71 for level 2 charger (240 volts)
This ballpark estimate covers the cost of electric vehicle charging station installation. There is no extra charge for electric car charger, necessary wiring, and permitting fees. The estimate does not cover level 3 chargers, tax rebates, and required upgrades to a home's electrical service.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$1,062.12 - $1,156.76 for level 2 charger (240 volts)
Although costs can vary, this is the average price for EV charging station installation.  It will most likely cover securing a permit, putting in an EV charger, wall mounting, and connecting wiring.  Not included in this estimate: upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30043, Lawrenceville, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$152.16 - $247.26 for level 1 charger (120 volts)
This ballpark estimate covers the cost of electric vehicle charging station installation. There is no extra charge for electric car charger, necessary wiring, and permitting fees. The estimate does not cover level 3 chargers, tax rebates, and required upgrades to a home's electrical service.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$152.96 - $248.56 for level 1 charger (120 volts)
Although costs can vary, this is the average price for EV charging station installation.  It will most likely cover securing a permit, putting in an EV charger, wall mounting, and connecting wiring.  Not included in this estimate: upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30022, Alpharetta, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$154.24 - $250.64 for level 1 charger (120 volts)
Price quote includes electric vehicle charging station installation. It includes standard charging station, connecting unit, and securing charger to wall too. Excludes upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30096, Duluth, Georgia - January 13, 2023
EV Home Charging Station Installation
$1,035.45 - $1,127.72 for level 2 charger (240 volts)
Price range takes into account electric vehicle charging station installation labor. Accounts for the price of standard charging station, connecting unit, and securing charger to wall. Excludes upgrading home electrical service, commercial charging stations, and tax credits.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - February 15, 2022
Residential Electrical Contractors
$62.14 - $75.52 per hour (plus parts and materials)
Cost estimate takes into account the price of residential electrical work. Price includes basic home electrical work (installation, repair, and maintenance). Excludes parts, emergency calls, weekend hours, and commercial electrical work.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - May 12, 2021
Upgrade Electrical Panel or Wiring
$1,739.92 - $2,294.40 fixed fee (upgrade panel to 200 amps)
Cost estimate considers the price of electrical panel upgrade. Price accounts for 200-amp electrical panel (mid-grade), supplies, and cleanup. Does not include emergency calls, overtime (nights and weekends), and extensive rewiring.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - March 5, 2021
Electrical Fixture Installation
$124.28 - $141.49 fixed fee to install 120v outlet
Includes manhours for electrical outlet installation. Cost takes into account 120V interior outlet, materials, and cleanup. Additional charge for emergency work, major rewiring, outdoor installations, GFCI outlets, and 220-240 volt outlets.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - September 26, 2020
Electrical for Remodel or Addition
$76.48 - $85.08 per hour (plus materials and parts)
This estimate includes electrical for home addition. Also includes running wires and installing outlets and switches for a new addition (open walls) . There is an additional cost for all materials and supplies, permitting, and overtime.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

30144, Kennesaw, Georgia - December 31, 2019
Commercial Electrical Contractors
$75.00 to $125.00 per hour (plus parts and materials)
We take credit cards only after services are render in most cases.
Reported by:
Trevor Brown, HB Retrofit, LLC

30058, Lithonia, Georgia - December 31, 2019
Electrical Fixture Installation
$50.00 to $175.00 per hour (plus parts and materials)
$120.00 to $150.00 fixed fee to install 240v outlet
$50.00 to $60.00 fixed fee to install 120v outlet
$50.00 to $60.00 fixed fee to install mid-grade light switch
Depends on scope. Pulling of wires and location and ect....
Reported by:
Terriss Clark, Handyman Georgia

30304, Atlanta, Georgia - June 7, 2018
Commercial Electrical Contractors
$81.26 - $88.91 per hour (plus parts and materials)
Includes manhours for commercial electrical work. Cost takes into account basic electrical work (installation, repair, and maintenance). Additional charge for parts, materials, minimum fees, emergency repairs.
Reported by:
ProMatcher Research Team

Disclaimer: Costs and prices shown on the ProMatcher site are intended to be used as general information, not as guaranteed estimates. To obtain cost information relevant to your project, request a quote or estimate from a local service provider.
